name: Gunsnation MCP Server
description: AI-ready MCP server for real-time access to the Gunsnation firearms catalog — product search and firearm specifications.

tools.name: search_firearms
tools.description: Search the Gunsnation catalog for firearms by name, category, caliber, or price range

tools.name: get_firearm
tools.description: Get detailed specifications for a specific firearm by ID including pricing from multiple vendors
